title: Zena's MC 1.19.2
description: A modpack that tries to expand Minecraft while fitting to Vanilla's style. Countering Minecraft's current flaws.
body:
Overhaul your Minecraft experience whether it's Singleplayer or a Multiplayer world with friends.
Whatever your playstyle is, you would still have fun. Explorer, Miner, Farmer, Melee or Ranged, This mod pack got it covered.

This modpack includes (Note: Please add your own shaderpack)

 • Changes to Progression

 • Difficulty Changes

 • New mobs

 • Expansion to Vanilla Hostile mobs

 • Changes to Combat and new additions

 • Changes and additions to farming and foraging

 • New Building and decoration blocks

 • New structures and improved                 Vanilla structures

 • Terrain generation for      
 Overworld, Nether and the End

 • Quality of Life mods

 • Visual changes and additions

 • Included optimizations

Problems are to be expected as there are a lot of mods in this pack.

I have no ownership of mods included in this modpack, as this is simply a modpack I managed to pile up.
